allow: PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='dotnet.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'EduNexus.Web' } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force; "stopped $\($_.ProcessId\)" }; Get-Process dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='dotnet.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'EduNexus.Web' } | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force; "stopped $\($_.ProcessId\)" } catch {} }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5112/ -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode } catch { "port closed" })
